picks.reasoning: Leipzig consistently finish strong and have superior squad depth compared to Freiburg. With rumors of new signings like Brajan Gruda, the team is looking forward with momentum, while Freiburg has struggled for consistency in the latter half of the season.

picks.match: FC St. Pauli vs VfL Wolfsburg
picks.reasoning: Wolfsburg are in a 'difficult and sad situation' with relegation threats looming large. FC St. Pauli, playing at their iconic Millerntor-Stadion, will look to finish their season with a statement win against a demoralized opponent.

Stuttgart have been one of the standout teams of the season. Their tactical fluidity and the clinical form of their front line make them favorites even away at Frankfurt, who have occasionally lacked defensive discipline in high-stakes matches.
